role: Root directory for unit tests verifying all core, infrastructure, and service components of the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Provides isolated and integration test suites that collectively validate the correctness, error handling, edge-case behavior, and contractual integrity of the entire ArchSpine system, including CLI commands, core aggregation and context engines, feature orchestrations, infrastructure modules (config, credentials, database, LLM, MCP, git hooks), scanner policies, service-layer operations, pipeline tasks, and rendering components.

children.role: Test suite for the ArchSpine skill CLI command.
Unit tests for core modules in the ArchSpine system including task orchestration, prompt generation, aggregation, repair policies, and validation.
Test suite directory for ArchSpine's God mode and MCP context mode.

Unit test suite for ArchSpine's infrastructure layer, covering configuration, credentials, database, document handling, LLM integration, manifest, MCP, git hooks, repository strategy, and rules loading.
This directory contains unit tests for rendering components within the ArchSpine mirror system.
Test suite for the scan policy engine and scanner module.
Unit test suites for the service layer of the ArchSpine mirror system, covering resume-aware sync, runtime operations, session management, and view generation.
Test suite for the core pipeline tasks: AggregationTask, KnowledgeGraphTask, SummarizationTask, and ValidateTask.
